reviews.review_title: Easily one of the best on Quest..
reviews.review_description:
Just finished chapter 1 - and was *overwhelmed* by how tight this production is.. I'd played a demo of it forever ago (of content I imagine will be in a later chapter) and this introduction was everything MoonMonster had promised - *laugh out loud* moments of funniness, solid VR mechanics, and a story that actually has me wanting to know more.

I really look forward to stepping into the next chapters, this was a riot!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind review! ❤️ Hope you continue to enjoy the rest of the game as well! Chapter 2 and 3 still have lots more content to give 😊

reviews.review_title: Lots of story but no real game meat
reviews.review_description: This has a ton of great potty humor, and lots and lots of dialog, but the game has no gameplay meat. It is a literal do this to progress story, and there are no repercussions for standing there other than to listen to nonstop dialog telling you to do something. It's no job simulator, it's no game whatsoever, it's a barely interactive story with more fidget spinners to interact with than actual gameplay. There is no pressure to complete it, it's all just something you have to do to progress the story. For 6 years of development, this is something that looks like it was designed in a couple of weeks, though the voice acting was pretty good. Everything else just wasn't there.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thank you for sharing your thoughts. We totally understand that the way our game is structured isn't going to be for everyone! It was a conscious decision to not have failstates or put too much pressure on the player, as we really wanted to make it a blend between experiencing an animated show-like world and story, with some light-hearted gameplay that's inspired by sim games. Sorry to hear it missed the mark for you!

reviews.review_title: Best game so farBest game so far in 2026
reviews.review_description: I recently saw this game on YouTube. I knew I had to have it. I bought it last week. Loved it. I’ve beat it once working on beating it again. I love how you can interact with everything but the only reason I gave it four stars. It’s not long enough but best game so far in 2026. ￼ I’d love to see a DLC or a part two ￼

This game is definitely not child friendly, but it's amazing!!! It reminds me of Cosmonious High and Startenders, which are 2 of my favorite games! It's also hilarious and I was cracking up! It's a high quality game and didn't give me any motion sickness. If you're on the fence about getting it, you should give it a try!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ever!
reviews.review_description: I love this game! I love how the game is targeted to 16+ and I love all the episodes, however I really really think this game would benefit from and endless mode or a sandbox. I finsihed this game in one day and I spent £15 on it I feel like people would be more inclined to buy this game if it had more episodes

Played through the first chapter and I love it. Pretty much everything is interactive and the dialogue is good. 

It’d like an adult version of fruit salon with a storyline, and it’s pretty funny love this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review!! We really focused on interactivity as much as possible in the environment, and fruit salon was definitely one of our inspirations for episode 1 😁

reviews.review_title: Top 3 best games of the summer
reviews.review_description: I really like story games that have comedy and this one was really good, there are some bugs like I spawn below the ground but they aren’t major just need to turn off my vr then turn it back on, I’d really wish it was longer because I completed it in 2 days but if they ad a dlc or more episodes than I will play it once I hear about it, would highly recommend

If you like games with rich hand interactions like Job Simulator this might be for you. If you also want an interesting story like Cosmonious High, but wished that had been less tame, this is definitely for you. 

There's less volume and freedom to explore here though. Instead you get 3 short but intense episodes that utilize interaction to turn you into an active participant of the story. The writing and acting really brings the setting and characters alive. The interactive environments have enough stuff to do that I never got bored even when replaying an episode.

My first VR job simulator experience. It was really good and fun! I thought the game had a really strong narrative, and they way it all comes together is brilliant. I especially liked how the AI companion worked where it can be seen on your watch and around the environments.

The game is 3 episodes but they are very good and long each being about an hour and a half each! Worth the money.

I thought the game could have been a bit sharper with the graphics. I know it's for standalone but making the characters a bit more detailed more like High on Life would have been good. I thought they were too bright. Also the comedy whilst ok I think would have been better being more like high on life's comedy. And the episodes could have been shorter maybe an hour instead of an hour and half because you can get tired from standing.

Lastly, whilst the ending was superb, with these kinds of games I would have liked a more get together ending where you get around a table or something at the end and you know happy vibes like a nice little send off with the team. You know like High on Life! But the ending was brilliant as it is I don't want to spoil anything but that was the first time I have done something like that and I enjoyed it. 

Overall though it was brilliant and nice clean game. I really do hope you get enough traction to make a sequel. Fingers crossed 🤞

reviews.review_title: What I think of space control
reviews.review_description: When I first bought this game I wasn't sure what to expect but after playing this it end up being fantastic I do have one note though maybe two notes first off I have no idea what to do after I beat the game second off with the achievements it would be nice to know what achievement I've gotten and which I haven't because when you going to the achievements thing they're all still completely blank even though I know I have achieved some of them so I can't exactly tell which I completed and which I've haven't

4.7/5 Because even though the chapters of the game are very fun and stupidly funny there are only 3 chapters which is kinda of a bummer because I was really thrilled to go the next chapter when I found out that there wasn’t a 4th one😭✌️but the game is super fun and recommend it.

PLEASE MAKE MORE CHAPTERS IM BEGGING🥲🙏

Woah! This game is crazy lol… in a good way of course… and more aimed at adults … perfect!

The gfx are very good, cartoon style but very clean and enjoyable… maybe in the Futurama style.
The sounds are great and so is the ingame speech and acting… one of the best.
The humour is bonkers!!! lol 😂… not exactly for the children out there, as there’s swearing and adult humour throughout… reminds me a little of the Monty Python humour… crazy, zany and funny… not a game like this on the quest lol

Game has great physics also in the game, being able to pick things up, manipulate them, use them, push and pull things, pull people’s ears, arms ect.. lol

The gameplay is good, funny and interesting.. again the humour is so well done in this game.
From cleaning recruits, preparing them for their job ahead and in some “interesting” ways lol… to making drinks out of burps.. I won’t say too much as don’t want to spoil the surprises and interesting tasks 🤫 🤣

This is a unique and interesting game.. and it’s good to see a game aimed more at the grown ups with the humour and jokes…. And like I say, there’s no other game like this on the quest!

Mad.. whacky… crazy… fun and awesome game!

Highly recommended!!
Are they coming out with a chapter 2 if so I need it ASAP and I hope it's as good as this one. By far the best game 26!!!  🤘👽🌌👩‍🚀👾🛸

reviews.review_title: A very high quality and funny game!
reviews.review_description:
The story, gameplay and voice acting in this game are truly amazing. The game is very well polished and you can see the hard work the developers put into it.
I would recommend Space Control to anyone, especially if you are a fan of similar humor like that in Rick and Morty and Futurama.

Firstly, graphics look really nice, cartoon based and fun to look around , the most fun is you grab everyone and shake their heads, most things are interactive, I spent 5 minutes punching the big blobby monster in the stomach, had fun playing with the fidget spinner, story feels engaging and interesting, I just warped through space, I will add more about the game as I go deeper.
But so far so good from the devs.

It has a good story, it might be for someone with a different sense of humor, but not for me. It's more like you're watching a 3 episode show, because you get no choice in anything, only interact with stuff. I hope they add more episodes in the future, it wasn't long enough.

reviews.review_title: Amazing display of the power of VR
reviews.review_description:
There is so much to do, you can basically interact with everything!
The storytelling and interactions are amazing. 
A Must Play for every VR enjoyer that likes some solid games and a good laugh.

As advertised. This is a great showcase for standalone headsets (for adults)  and everyone (who's an adult) should be playing it :) QGO improves resolution and I can't imagine PC version being much better due to the art style. Voice acting is fantastic.
I played the whole game and I need more of this bro please add more chapters this is the best game I have ever played in my whole life
Make more I really enjoyed this game
Nice animation and colourful but I found the story line if it actually had one rather dull and everything else was rather repetitive
Fun adult Job Simulator type game with a nice story campaign.  Graphics simple yet nice.  Great audio and all the mechanics work very well.  Must have for any adult with a sense of humor!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on quest
reviews.review_description: I’m not usually into these types of games but just played part one and it was a blast, so much fun and laughs to be had. I won’t spoil the game but some of the things you have to do was too funny. Worth every cent 👍🏻
Great game. Fun design. Everything was good. Except only being 3 episodes. Def not worth 20$. Should be way longer or way cheaper. I wont be buying the next unless its half the price

reviews.review_title: This game was a hell of a surprise
reviews.review_description:
When I saw this game at first I thought it was a PG all ages game but then I played the game, and I was far from right, if you loved the Rick and Morty VR game or Rick and Morty itself you will love the humor of this game, I think the game does what it comes to do very well and most of the time shows a very fun gameplay.

But there's still some problems, 

I didn't really like the second episode of the game 
Because it feels like that episode was added just to make the game longer, not only it doesn't add to the story, there is hardly any gameplay and the places they could add gameplay was saved to the end (and every episode is an hour long).

But at the end of the day, I highly recommend to play it because even though it's not perfect it is really really fun in its story, the most of the time it feels like you play in an internet animated show, and about the characters of the game I'm very conflicted, there are some characters that I like, there are some characters that I like less, and their characters that are just annoying, anyway I highly recommend to play it because it is a really good, if the developers will fix the second episode, this game will be almost perfect. (Zorgle my goat).

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your thoughtful review! Very valid feedback about episode 2, it was actually the one we made first, but it ended up being the weakest one of the bunch 😩 We have a few ideas for improvements, but we'd love to hear your suggestions if you have any! Feel free to join our discord at discord.glorpo.be to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Super funny, wild, really well made.. The way you can interact with items and other people was fun. Voice acting was on point 😊👍🏼 food coming to life was super hilarious. A perfect 10/10
Nice humor, varying gameplay, funny dialogues. I heard the game studio spent years making this game and it really shows. Definitely worth the money.

reviews.review_title: Had a tone of fun with it!
reviews.review_description: Found it really engaging and enjoyable.
My favourite level was probably chapter 2 I'm not gonna say anything about it but the ending was insane I would highly recommend buying it
Adult swim type humor, and very good voice acting. Hope they release more episodes.
Played the entire game and it was a blast to play loved the story and characters hope more episodes soon

reviews.review_title: Don’t buy if over 8 years old
reviews.review_description: Game play is nonexistent, story is boring, lots of waiting thru boring dialogue. Not really funny. great for children under 7
The best VR game I have played so far! Love the humour characters and interactions! And the finale is absolutely amazing!
The game is inappropriate for kids it has weird stuff would not recamend for young kids the rating should by 17 and up lot teen

developer_response.body: Hey there, thank you for the review and apologies, the rating has since been corrected! We had some troubles with the backend of the store that have since been fixed 😊

reviews.review_description: Best game I've played on the oculus in such a long time!
The storyline is great, the characters have so much depth! This game will top charts and it's well earned!
Very fun game, with an engaging story and lots of unexpected surprises.
i finished the game earlyer this week and ever since i can't stop thinking about it must play only complant is that is too short
I can’t explain, BUT JUST BUY THE GAME!
Very cool and nice game
Awsomesauce!!!!
I love the character and the gameplay
So many interactive things and really goofy objects, it's very refreshing. The characters  are also really fun, especially the big purple guy, he's so sweet and dumb lol
It was a really fun experience. Reminded me of Rick and Morty
Wwwwww
game of the year
One of the best job sim out there
Cool game
